g.text: golden prompts, golden SQL, regression checks
cost per suggestion, cost per saved rule
by domain, model, prompt type, hour
soft cap, hard cap, policy fallback
who approved, why blocked, what changed
prompt tuning, model routing, runbook updates
- A measurable operating architecture for DRE 3D, not only component topology.
- Architecture quality must be proven by SLOs, model quality, cost efficiency,
and user adoption - continuously, not as one-time design output.
- Add explicit control planes for reliability, observability, model benchmarking,
- Tie all planes into one control tower with release fitness gates.
- Diagnosis latency p95, deflection success rate, DRRI trend
- Cost per saved rule and budget variance
- Funnel conversion and weekly active users
- Policy violation rate and exception closure SLA
Reliability + Observability + Model Benchmarking + FinOps + Adoption + Governance
